stem: Each vertex of a 16-sided polygon is labeled with one of the 16 letters A through P, with a different letter at each vertex. If one vertex is selected at random, what is the probability that the letter F will be at the selected vertex? (Express your answer as a decimal or fraction, not as a percent.)
rationale: The correct answer is 1/16 (equivalently 0.0625). There are 16 vertices, each labeled with a different letter A through P, so exactly one vertex is labeled F. The probability of selecting that vertex at random is 1/16, or 0.0625.
